content.en:
Rumble!!!!

As soon as they entered the palace, Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden felt an unimaginable pressure and imprisoning power.

Originally, Ye Tian could barely shuttle through the space in the battlefield ruins, although he couldn't shuttle too far away, but it wasn't so much that he couldn't even break the space.

But now, he is restricted inside the palace, and he can't even shake the space, let alone shuttle through the space.

"It's worthy of the palace of the top true ancestor, the prohibition here is too strong!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Be careful!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Hmm!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded, followed Ye Tian closely, and kept within ten meters, not daring to go beyond this range.

The interior of the palace is very large, and it is very gorgeous, and it is full of treasures.

Perhaps in the eyes of those top True Ancestors, some of the things in this palace were just ordinary things, but in the eyes of Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden, they were great treasures.

For example, Ye Tian saw a potted plant, although the plants on it had died and turned into ashes, but the soil on this potted plant was green wood yuansoil, which was a very rare and rare soil system, which could be used to plant extremely high-grade wood plants.

It is conceivable that this potted plant is definitely a rare treasure, and it may be useful to Dao Ancestor, but without care and cultivation, this plant died completely.

But just Aoki Yuanyang, it's also a great treasure.

In the midst of chaos, many rare and precious plants are difficult to feed, and even in places where chaos vitality is strong, they cannot be cultivated, but with Aoki Yuan soil, it can be easily fed.

In addition, the basin that carries Aoki Yuan Soil is not an ordinary thing, but a kind of wood and steel stone, and it is also a very precious stone, which is enough to be used to refine semi-Taoist utensils, but compared to Aoki Yuan Soil, the value is much worse.

Ye Tian and the Yunzi Divine Maiden assigned the green wood yuan soil and the wood steel stone basin, Ye Tian was not much excited, after all, he had a lot of treasures, and he didn't care about this.

But the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden was very excited, this was the first time she had obtained such a precious treasure.

Although there are countless opportunities in the Quasi-Dao Realm, because her strength is too weak, the treasures she has obtained are too few and too few.

Now, she has obtained a treasure like Aoki Yuanyang all of a sudden, and she is naturally very excited.

Along.

The two of them have gained a lot, and the Yunzi Divine Maiden has been extremely excited from the beginning, and now she is accustomed to it, after all, she has seen a lot of treasures, and that's it.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian stopped and said, "There is danger!"

The Yunzi Divine Maiden also sensed the depression, but everything inside the palace was restricted, and it was difficult for the divine sense to penetrate the walls, and it was difficult to sense that something was approaching here.

But she also knew that there must be some powerful creature or puppet coming.

Rumble!!!!

A humanoid puppet appeared in the sense of the two of them.

It was a servant-like puppet that looked similar to a normal human, except for its dark skin and scales that resembled dragon scales.

These scales are not real scales, but they are also a material, specially made to do so, and have extremely terrifying defenses.

"It's a puppet, and it's not an ordinary puppet!"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

When this puppet saw Ye Tian, he immediately attacked, making Ye Tian's idea of a peaceful solution frustrated.

"Eternal fire is not extinguished!"

Ye Tian used this chaotic magic power to test it, but the eternal fire fell on the puppet's body, and he didn't do anything about it at all, but was annihilated by its easy slap of both hands.

"Shake the sky!"

Ye Tian shot again, and the middle-grade origin divine power shook the sky, and there was a slight sense of shock in the space.

And the puppet was also directly shocked out, and the scales on its body began to crack.

But even so, the puppet was not destroyed.

"This is a True Ancestor level puppet!"

Ye Tian said loudly.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden was also stunned, in the God of War Tower, there seemed to be only a few True Ancestor-level puppets, and they were almost regarded as treasures, so they didn't dare to use them at all, for fear of being destroyed.

A puppet of this level is even comparable to a Dao weapon!

Only those direct descendants of Dao Ancestors, under certain special circumstances, would use such puppets for protection.

But I never expected that there would be such a True Ancestor-level puppet here!

"Fortunately, I called Wanfa Daozi, if I came alone, I'm afraid I would have died at this moment!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden rejoiced in her heart.

Ye Tian no longer despised this puppet, the Golden Eye Realm opened, enveloping this puppet, suppressing it to the death, and then the two origin divine powers of Earthquake Sky and Divine Power attacked this puppet together.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also holding a half-way weapon long knife and attacking it with a door knife technique.

Under Ye Tian's continuous attack, there were more and more cracks on this puppet's body.

Ultimately.

This puppet was chopped to pieces by Ye Tian, and the power core was also destroyed.

However, Ye Tian still put away the fragments of this puppet, at least the materials of these fragments are not ordinary, and they are still very valuable.

But as soon as he put away these puppets, Ye Tian's expression changed greatly.

"It's not good, let's go, at least ten True Ancestor puppets are coming!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word, he pulled the Yunzi Divine Maiden and cast the Void Shift, although he couldn't shuttle through the space, his speed was far beyond that of other half-step True Ancestors, and even surpassed many True Ancestors.

Next, the two of them dodged the True Ancestor-level puppets all the way and collected treasures along the way.

Whatever they could see, they put it away, and they didn't even look at what it was, because they didn't have time to judge the origin of these treasures.

I'm just going to go out and check it out slowly.

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian came to a certain attic in this palace.

The palace resembles a small world and has a lot of unique architecture, and this loft is absolutely extraordinary.

"Hidden God Pavilion!"

Ye Tian looked at the name on the attic and had some guesses in his heart.

However, there was a forbidden formation in the attic, and Ye Tian couldn't break the formation.

"I'll try it with the Legacy Key!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden took the inheritance key to communicate the prohibition of this Tibetan God Pavilion, and the communication was really successful.

Click!

The prohibition of the Hidden God Pavilion cracked open a portal.

Immediately

The two entered the Tibetan God Pavilion, and the prohibition of the Tibetan God Pavilion was quickly restored.

"This inheritance key is really extraordinary, it should be controlled by the formation of this palace, but it's a pity that we can't control those puppets, otherwise we will be easier!"

Ye Tian sighed.

"If I can control those puppets, then wouldn't I be able to sweep through the Quasi-Dao Realm?"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said with a smile.

There were not just ten, but many, and perhaps even more powerful True Ancestor-level puppets in this palace, and if she controlled such a force, she really didn't have to fear anyone.

But that's not realistic!

"Let's go, let's go see what's in this Hidden God Pavilion?"

Ye Tian said.
